subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Spirit of the Covenant! His honor Khan is present in this gathering and the tongue of praise extolleth that beloved one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب من روح المیثاق جناب خان در این محضر حاضر و لسان ستایش از آن حبیب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
